attacking_style: Opportunistic finisher who capitalizes on hesitation from marked rivals. Attacks in final kilometer from small breakaways when favorites are neutralizing each other.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Operates effectively in breakaways where tactical awareness can outweigh raw power. Benefits from scenarios with multiple marked riders.
vulnerability: Unknown - single observation shows only strength. Likely vulnerable when isolated without tactical confusion among rivals.
key_patterns: Exploits psychological hesitation among more experienced/higher-profile riders in decisive moments
Precise final kilometer timing when breakaway companions mark each other rather than him
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows intelligent tactical execution but insufficient data for trajectory assessment
